result_text: ADRENALINE RUSH. [+] on all rolls for the next 2d10 minutes. Reduce Stress by 1d5.
JUMPY. Gain 1 Stress. All Close crewmembers gain 2 Stress.
OVERWHELMED. [-] on all rolls for the next 1d10 minutes. Increase Minimum Stress by 1.
COWARD. Gain a new Condition: You must make a Fear Save to engage in violence, otherwise you flee.
FRIGHTENED. Gain a new Condition: When encountering what frightened you, make a Fear Save [-] or gain 1d5 Stress.
NIGHTMARES. Gain a new Condition: Sleep is difficult, gain [-] on Rest Saves.
LOSS OF CONFIDENCE. Gain a new Condition: Choose one Skill and lose that Skill's bonus.
DEFLATED. Gain a new Condition: Whenever a Close crewmember fails a Save, gain 1 Stress.
DOOMED. Gain a new Condition: You feel cursed and unlucky. All Critical Successes are instead Critical Failures.
Grazed. Lose 1d5 Health next round from blood loss. Can be treated with a First Aid Kit.
Sliced. A nasty cut. Disadvantage [-] on all physical actions until treated.
Deep Gash. Lose 1d10 Health per round until someone spends an action applying pressure.
Lacerated Tendon. Lose use of one limb (roll d4: 1-2 arm, 3-4 leg). Surgery required to restore full function.
Arterial Bleed. Lose 2d10 Health per round. Field Medicine check each round to slow bleeding. Surgery required.
Eviscerated. Abdominal wound. Lose 1d10 Health/round. Gain 1d10 Stress from horror of seeing your own insides.
Blinded. One eye destroyed. Disadvantage [-] on Combat and Perception checks. Permanent unless surgically treated.
Severed Limb. An arm or leg is cut off. Body Save or fall unconscious. 1 Stress per nearby crew who witnesses.
Throat Cut. Body Save each round or lose another 1d10 Health. Gain 2 Stress. Immediate medical attention required.
Exsanguination. You bleed out in 1d5 rounds unless someone makes a Field Medicine check to stabilise you. Gain 1d10 Stress.
Bruised. Cosmetic wound. You look terrible but function normally.
Compound Fracture. A bone breaks grotesquely. Disadvantage [-] on all physical checks until set and splinted.
Ruptured. Internal organs rupture. Gain 1 Stress and lose 1d10 Health per hour until surgically repaired.
Eye Gouged Out. Lose one eye. All ranged Combat Checks at Disadvantage [-]. Gain 2 Stress from the horror.
Dismembered. Limb torn free. Body Save or go into shock (unconscious 1d10 rounds). Nearby crew: Fear Save.
Disembowelled. Abdominal cavity opened. 2d10 DMG per round until treated. Nearby crew: Sanity Save.
Skull Fractured. Head trauma. Permanent -10 to Intellect. Sanity Save or catatonic for 1d10 minutes.
Spine Severed. Paralysed from the point of injury down. Surgery may restore function. Gain 1d10 Stress.
Face Destroyed. Your face is unrecognisable. Permanent -10 to social interactions. Gain 1d10 Stress. All witnesses: Fear Save.
Torn Apart. You are ripped limb from limb. Instant death. Each surviving crew member gains 1d10 Stress and must make a Sanity Save.
Graze. The bullet barely connects. Cosmetic damage only.
Flesh Wound. Shot but not seriously. Disadvantage [-] on physical checks until patched.
Through-and-Through. Clean entry and exit. 1d10 bonus damage from shock. First Aid stabilises.
Shattered Bone. Bone fragments inside the wound. Surgery required. Limb unusable until treated.
Gut Shot. Serious abdominal wound. Body Save each hour or take 1d10 additional damage from internal bleeding.
Arterial Hit. Blood everywhere. 2d10 damage per round until someone makes a Field Medicine check.
Head Shot (Partial). Concussive. Lose next action. Permanent -5 Intellect. Gain 1 Stress.
Organ Damage. A vital organ is hit. Body Save each day or condition worsens. Surgery required within 24 hours.
Spinal Hit. Possible paralysis. Body Save or lose all feeling below the wound site. Gain 1d10 Stress.
Headshot. Instant death. Nearby crew must make a Fear Save.
Rattled. Shaken but intact. Disadvantage [-] on your next action.
Knocked Down. Prone and winded. Lose next action standing up.
Sprained. A joint is damaged. Disadvantage [-] on physical checks using that limb until treated.
Cracked Rib. Breathing is painful. Disadvantage [-] on all strenuous physical actions. Heals in 1d10 days with rest.
Concussion. Stunned for 1 round. Permanent -5 Intellect. Sanity Save or experience recurring headaches.
Broken Bone. A major bone breaks. Limb unusable. Field Medicine to splint. Surgery to fully repair.
Organ Rupture. Internal damage from blunt impact. Body Save each day or condition worsens.
Severe Concussion. Unconscious for 1d10 minutes. Permanent -10 Intellect. Trauma causes 1 Stress.
Crushed. A limb is crushed beyond saving. Amputation required. Body Save or go into shock.
Traumatic Brain Injury. Catatonic for 1d10 hours. Permanent -15 Intellect and -5 to all Saves. Gain 1d10 Stress.
Singed. Hair gone, skin reddened. Cosmetic. Gain 1 Stress from the horror.
Burns (Minor). 1st and 2nd degree burns. Disadvantage [-] on physical tasks. Medscanner required to assess depth.
On Fire. Still burning. Take 2d10 DMG per round until extinguished. Body Save each round.
Flash Burned. Eyes and face. Temporarily blinded for 1d10 rounds. Permanent scarring. Gain 1 Stress.
Deep Burns. 3rd degree burns to major body area. 1d10 damage per hour without treatment. Surgery required.
Lung Scorched. Inhaled fire or toxic gas. Body Save each round or take 1d10 damage. Cannot run or shout.
Concussive Blast. Thrown by explosion. Stunned 1 round. Potential hearing loss (-5 Speed, -5 Combat) — Body Save.
Shrapnel. Multiple embedded fragments. 1d10 damage per round from blood loss. Surgery to remove each fragment.
Engulfed. Completely on fire. 4d10 damage per round. Body Save or go into full panic. Nearby crew: Fear Save.
Vapourised. Reduced to ash by direct explosion. Instant death. All nearby crew: Sanity Save or gain 1d10 Stress.

Vaccsuit (AP3), Foam Gun (2 charges), Foldable Stretcher, First Aid Kit, Radiation Pills ×5
Lab Coat (AP1), Screwdriver (as Assorted Tools), Medscanner, Vaccine (1 dose)
Lab Coat (AP1), Cybernetic Diagnostic Scanner, Portable Computer Terminal
Scrubs (AP1), Scalpel, Automed ×5, Oxygen Tank with Filter Mask
Scrubs (AP1), Vial of Acid, Mylar Blanket, First Aid Kit
Standard Crew Attire (AP1), Utility Knife (as Scalpel), Cybernetic Diagnostic Scanner, Duct Tape
Civilian Clothes (AP1), Briefcase, Prescription Pad, Fountain Pen (Poison Injector)
Vaccsuit (AP3), Laser Cutter (1 extra battery), Patch Kit ×3, Toolbelt with Assorted Tools
Vaccsuit (AP3), Rigging Gun (1 shot), Shovel, Salvage Drone
Hazard Suit (AP5), Vibechete, Spanner, Camping Gear, Water Filtration Device
Heavy Duty Work Clothes (AP2), Explosives & Detonator, Cigarettes
Heavy Duty Work Clothes (AP2), Drill (as Assorted Tools), Paracord (100m), Salvage Drone
Standard Crew Attire (AP1), Combat Shotgun (4 rounds), Extension Cord (20m), Cat (pet)
Standard Crew Attire (AP1), Nail Gun (32 rounds), Head Lamp, Toolbelt with Assorted Tools, Lunch Box
Standard Crew Attire (AP1), Flare Gun (2 rounds), Water Filtration Device, Personal Locator, Subsurface Scanner
Lounge Wear (AP1), Crowbar, Stimpak, Six Pack of Beer
Manual: SURVIVAL: Eat Soup With a Knife
Coffee Cup, Chipped, reads: HAPPINESS IS MANDATORY
Stress Ball, reads: Zero Stress in Zero G
Interstellar Compass, Always Points to Homeworld
ALL SYSTEMS NORMAL. 5×5. Ready to ride.
EMERGENCY FUEL LEAK. Every time you spend Fuel, spend 1 more.
WEAPONS OFFLINE. Cannot make Weapons Checks.
NAVIGATION OFFLINE. Cannot make Thrusters Checks. 10% chance all navigation data wiped.
FIRE ON DECK. Fire spreads throughout the ship, creating toxic and highly corrosive atmosphere (10 DMG/round).
HULL BREACH. All crew make a Body Save or take 1 Wound (Explosion). On critical failure, violently sucked into space.
LIFE SUPPORT OFFLINE. Oxygen limited to 1d10 × maximum crew capacity (in minutes).
RADIATION LEAK. Radiation Level increases by 1 every 2d10 minutes.
DEAD IN THE WATER. All systems offline. Emergency power only.
ABANDON SHIP! Ship is destroyed in 1d10 minutes.
Explore the Unknown — Survey an uncharted planet or strange vessel at the rim.
Investigate a Strange Rumour — Something in the vents; colonists disappearing.
Salvage a Derelict Ship — Distress signal on repeat; all escape pods ejected.
Exterminate an Otherworldly Threat — Wipe them out; bring back a living sample.
Visit an Offworld Colony — The Company hasn't heard from miners on PK-294.
Undertake a Dangerous Mission — A C-level's child 'kidnapped' by a fringe religious group.
Survive a Colossal Disaster — Abandon ship! Radiation leaks, warp anomalies.
Respond to a Distress Signal — Help is never nearby; never tell the real cries from the traps.
Transport Precious Cargo — They won't tell you what's in the container.
Make Contact with the Beyond — Found at the edge of the system on a frozen moon.
Spoiled Food — Geometric / Lust — Gnarled / Fingers — Coiling / Tentacles
Melted Plastic — Disjointed / Parasitism — Riotus / Flesh — Angelic / Faces
Blackened Metal — Sharp / Confusion — Seeking / Tongues — Cruel / Talons
Stitched Cloth — Grotesque / Religious — Twisted / Limbs — Serrated / Beaks
Disassembled Firearms — Abstract / Violence — Gnashing / Teeth — Elegant / Probosci
Bone / Teeth — Brutal / Melting — Unnerving / Smiles — Incandescent / Wings
Unorthodox Taxidermy — Rapturous / Paranoia — Sliced / Hands — Proud / Antlers
Gouged Wood — Ornate / Transformation — Palpating / Gristle — Scintillating / Scales
Android Parts — Decadent / Hopelessness — Dark / Pus — Slashing / Hooves
Stone — Brittle / Fertility — Split / Lips — Spiny / Fins
Facility Staff. Knowledge of layout absent.
Injured Diver. Believes stashed here while companions sought help.
Troubleshooter. Remembers being captured by something, then waking.
Researcher. Betrayed by the Diver they hired.
Android Theologian. Here to ascertain existence of Android Souls. Hunted by Troubleshooters.
Bounty Hunter. Looking to capture an ex-pirate Diver. No memory of ending up here.
Hacker. Seeking ultimate battle: them vs. Monarch. Attempted to hack network; pod activated instead.
Criminal Enforcer. Tried to use the pods to ambush someone — won't say who.
Journalist. Here to document the truth of THE DEEP. Androids shoved them in pod.
Infected Cyberfreak — Combat 20, Unarmed 1d5 DMG + Infect, Speed 20, Instinct 20, Wounds 3
1d10 Diamond Dogs — Combat 65, Bite/Bite/Claw 1d10 DMG, Speed 85, Instinct 35, Wounds 1
Sleevewraith — Combat 70, Rusty Blade 2d10 DMG, Speed 45, Instinct 35, Wounds 2. Reclamation Sleeve with combat slickware.
Slicksquid — Combat 65, Tentacle/Tentacle 3d10 DMG, Speed 50, Instinct 85, Wounds 3. Projected into The Court via Slickbay.
The Brute — Combat 65, Swipe 5d10 DMG (hits multiple targets), Speed 25, Instinct 75, Wounds 5. Giant slow mech.
Specimen 869 — Combat 85, Psi-Blast (Sanity Save or Xd10 DMG + 1d10 Stress; X = rounds concentrating), Speed 35, Instinct 95, Wounds 2.
Golyonovo Traitor. Can pay 1d10×100cr for an Advocate. Must fight Chief Adjudicator Brunhildh.
O2 Debtor. No money. Talking to Ukko/Ukka (Solarian High Gardener) might help.
Contraband Smuggler. Has 50kcr and offers a free ride out.
Teamster who stole from Yandee. Offers 1d100×1kcr and a free ride (max 3 Jumps).
Hunglung Insurgent. Can't afford Advocate, but Imogene Kane will owe you a favour if you help.
Political Prisoner. Enemy of the Teamster Union, Tempest, Golyonovo II Bratva, or Solarian Church. Worth 300kcr+ if you win the rigged trial and escort them off The Dream.

Pamphlet: Zen and the Art of Cargo Arrangement
Pair of Shot Glasses (Spent Shotgun Shells)
Pamphlet: A Lover In Every Port
Fleshy Thing Sealed in a Murky Jar

Miniature Chess Set, Bone, Pieces Missing
Pendant: Two Astronauts form a Skull
Trucker Cap, Mesh, Grey Alien Logo
"I'm Not A Rocket Scientist / But You're An Idiot"
Medic Patch (Skull and Crossbones over Cross)
"Don't Run You'll Only Die Tired" Backpatch
"I Like My Tools Clean / And My Lovers Dirty"
"The Louder You Scream the Faster I Come" (Nurse Pin-Up)
"All Out of Fucks To Give" (Astronaut with Turned Out Pockets)
"Travel To Distant Places / Meet Unusual Things / Get Eaten"
BOHICA (Bend Over Here It Comes Again)
Poker Hand: Dead Man's Hand* (*Aces Full Of Eights)
SUSPICIOUS. For the next week, whenever someone joins the crew (even briefly), make a Fear Save or gain 1 Stress.
HAUNTED. Gain a new Condition: Something starts visiting the character at night. In their dreams. Out of the corner of their eye. And soon it will start making demands.
DEATH WISH. For the next 24 hours, whenever encountering a stranger or known enemy, make a Sanity Save or immediately attack them.
PROPHETIC VISION. Immediately experience an intense hallucination or vision of an impending terror. Increase Minimum Stress by 2.
CATATONIC. Become unresponsive and unmoving for 2d10 minutes. Reduce Stress by 1d10.
RAGE. [+] on all Damage rolls for the next 1d10 hours. All crewmembers gain 1 Stress.
SPIRALING. Gain a new Condition: Panic Checks are at [-].
COMPOUNDING PROBLEMS. Roll twice on this table. Increase Minimum Stress by 1.
HEART ATTACK / SHORT CIRCUIT (ANDROIDS). Reduce Maximum Wounds by 1. Gain [-] on all rolls for 1d10 hours. Increase Minimum Stress by 1.
RETIRE. Roll up a new character to play.

label: Failing to stop a previous Transgression
result_text: Failing to stop a previous Transgression

label: Allowing harm to come to an innocent
result_text: Allowing harm to come to an innocent

label: Inter remains in rightful resting place
result_text: Inter remains in rightful resting place

label: Trapping it inside a powerful container
result_text: Trapping it inside a powerful container

label: Herald of a greater Horror to come
result_text: Herald of a greater Horror to come

label: Never stay in one place too long
result_text: Never stay in one place too long

label: Parental entity comes looking for answers
result_text: Parental entity comes looking for answers

label: Space Truckers
result_text: Blockade running, smuggling, or working as a certified owner-operator. Never a dull shift hauling cargo across the Rim. Watch out for stowaways and customs patrols, and always pay your union dues.

label: Private Mercenaries
result_text: Jump and drop. Sweep and clear. Seek and destroy. You go where the Company sends you. They said if you had a vaccsuit and were willing to travel, you would always be flush with credits. They were not wrong.

label: Explorers
result_text: You wanted to go where no one had gone before. Turns out there is a reason why. What you found out there was not something anyone back home would understand. So you had to keep going.

label: Dogs of War
result_text: Humanity was in trouble and you answered the call. You have looked into the yawning maw of destruction. Your response? Come and take it.

label: Corporate Inspectors
result_text: Production has shut down on mining station Ypsilon-14. The Alexis research vessel has disappeared. There is a strike brewing on Prospero's Dream. The C-Levels have questions. Find out, fix it, and sign the NDA.

label: Offworld Colonists
result_text: You volunteered. Planting terraformers in inhospitable environments, researching planetary phenomena, defending against local flora and fauna. On the Rim, life is what you make of it.

label: Crashlanders
result_text: You scraped together a Jumpliner ticket to a new life. But the sirens are blaring and you are waking from cryosleep to screams. Abandon ship! Whether you fix it or ride it to the ground, your life will never be the same.

label: Hyperspace Raiders
result_text: It has always been illegal to steal, but only recently illegal to own. Stealing from the rich, giving to whomever you please. Jump before the Marshalls close in, and always watch for bounty hunters.

label: Mining & Salvage
result_text: Asteroid mining, skimming gas giants, salvaging derelicts. The pay is steady and they do not make you wear a suit and tie. What more could you ask for?

label: Bounty Hunters
result_text: There is no law on the Rim, just Corporate Policy. Those who break it paint a target on their back. Check the bounty boards, bring in your charge, stay alive. The rules are easy. Getting it done is hard.

label: Production & Manufacture
result_text: Asteroid mining, derelict salvage and scrap, strikebreaking, terraformer installation, and android troubleshooting.

label: Shipping & Handling
result_text: Cargo freight, VIP escort, scrap hauling, prisoner transport, sensitive materials handling, passenger transport, and contraband smuggling.

label: Research & Development
result_text: Sample and specimen collection, planetary survey, field testing, sabotage, containment breach, archaeological dig, and corporate espionage.

label: Risk Management
result_text: Sweep and clear, liquidation, asset protection, quarantine enforcement, bounty hunting, distress signal response, and system patrol.

label: Human Resources
result_text: Missing persons, suspicious death, communication breakdown, troubleshooting, AI negotiation, and settlement evacuation.

label: Mergers & Acquisitions
result_text: Asset recovery, salvage retention, personnel recruitment, first contact protocol, repossession, and piracy.

label: Powerful Favor
result_text: The client cannot pay, but they are powerful and well connected. They owe the crew a big favor, called in at the crew's discretion.

label: Desperate
result_text: Pays 1d10x100cr up front. This is all the client has. Doing this job would make them a longtime ally.

label: Barter Agreement
result_text: The client can only offer trade: astronavigation data, ship repairs, weapons, equipment, or other accommodations.

label: Grunt Work
result_text: Pays the crew's salaries, but expenses are the crew's to handle. Jump and Hazard Pay are out of the question.

label: Payday
result_text: Pays 1d10x10,000cr on completion and up to 10% up front. All travel expenses paid. Up to 1d10 Contractors to assist.

label: Jackpot
result_text: Pays 1d10x1,000,000cr on completion and up to 1d10x10,000cr up front. All expenses paid. Private contractors available on request.

label: Ray Burtnolds is Alive and Well and Living on Casimir
result_text: Ray Burtnolds is Alive and Well and Living on Casimir

label: The Alliance of Hyperspace Jump Couriers
result_text: The Alliance of Hyperspace Jump Couriers

label: The Evangelical Solarion Church
result_text: The Evangelical Solarion Church (AKA The Solarians)

result_text: Colonists report being replaced by imposters.

result_text: Under constant threat of terrorist attacks.

result_text: Rumors of meddling from powerful AI.

result_text: Settlement being shut down by corporate.

label: Petty bickering escalating out of control.
result_text: Petty bickering escalating out of control.

result_text: Wreckage of spacecraft of unknown origin.

result_text: Ruins of precursor star-faring civilization found.
